description:
Remove 5 dead/orphaned systems in one sweep. ~1,300 LOC deleted. No useful logic to preserve.

## CopilotKitThreadService
- Delete `apps/server/src/services/copilotkit-thread-service.ts`
- Delete `apps/server/src/routes/copilotkit/` (entire directory)
- Remove route mount and import from `apps/server/src/server/routes.ts`
- Remove service instantiation from `apps/server/src/server/services.ts`

## TrajectoryStoreService
- Delete `apps/server/src/services/trajectory-store-service.ts`
- Remove instantiation from `services.ts`
- Remove fire-and-forget calls in `apps/server/src/services/lead-engineer-deploy-processor.ts` and `lead-engineer-escalation.ts`
- Remove optional `trajectoryStoreService` field from lead-engineer-types.ts and LeadEngineerService

## Codex Services (3 files)
- Delete `apps/server/src/services/codex-app-server-service.ts`
- Delete `apps/server/src/services/codex-usage-service.ts`
- Delete `apps/server/src/services/codex-model-cache-service.ts`
- Delete `apps/server/src/routes/codex/` (entire directory)
- Remove all 3 from `services.ts` and route mount from `routes.ts`

## VoiceService
- Delete `apps/server/src/services/voice-service.ts`
- Delete `apps/server/src/routes/voice/` (entire directory)
- Remove from `services.ts` and `routes.ts`

## TwitchService
- Delete `apps/server/src/services/twitch/` (entire directory — twitch-service.ts + any sub-files)
- Delete `apps/server/src/routes/twitch.ts`
- Remove from `services.ts` and `routes.ts`
- Remove TWITCH_* env vars from any env var documentation tables in `docs/`

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Zero references to CopilotKit thread service, TrajectoryStore, Codex services, VoiceService, TwitchService in server code
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes after removal
- [ ] `npm run test:server` passes
- [ ] `npm run build:packages` succeeds
- [ ] Server starts cleanly (no missing service errors)
- [ ] No broken imports remaining
title: Dead code purge — CopilotKit, Trajectory, Codex, Voice, Twitch
